name: Protegrity Data Protection Plugin Suite
description: Enterprise-grade data protection for Cursor IDE using Protegrity AI Developer Edition. New users: run 'Protegrity: Setup Wizard' to get started in minutes!
detailedDescription:
Comprehensive data discovery, protection, and privacy controls for Cursor IDE using Protegrity AI Developer Edition APIs.

**The plugin drives all data protection — not Cursor's AI.**
Every operation goes through Protegrity's APIs for enterprise-grade, auditable, policy-enforced protection.

**🆕 New to Protegrity? Start here:**
1. Install this plugin
2. Open Command Palette → `Protegrity: Setup Wizard`
3. The wizard gives you a personalized setup plan in 2 minutes
4. Run `Protegrity: Status Check` to see what's ready

**Key Features (v2.0.0):**
• 🔍 Analyze Data Sensitivity — detect 15+ PII entity types
• ✂️ Redact Sensitive Data — remove or mask PII
• 🔗 Find and Redact — discover + remove in one step
• 🔒 Protect Text — enterprise tokenization (reversible)
• 🔓 Unprotect Text — recover original from token
• 🔗 Find and Protect — discover + tokenize in one step
• 🛡️ Scan Conversation Risk — guardrails for AI conversations
• 🧪 Generate Synthetic Data — realistic fake datasets
• 🕵️ Anonymize Data — irreversible anonymization
• 🩺 Status Check — see which services are ready
• 🧙 Setup Wizard — personalized setup guide
• 👤 Privacy Reviewer Agent — codebase privacy audit
• 🔐 Security Compliance Auditor Agent

**⚠️ PREREQUISITES BY FEATURE:**

**🐳 Docker (free, no account needed)**
Required for: Analyze, Redact, Find & Redact, Scan Risk, Synthetic Data, Anonymize
Setup: `git clone https://github.com/Protegrity-AI-Developer-Edition/protegrity-ai-developer-edition.git`
Then: `cd <service-folder> && docker compose up -d`

**🔑 Free API Account**
Required for: Protect Text, Unprotect Text, Find & Protect
Setup: Register at https://www.protegrity.com/developers/dev-edition-api

See PREREQUISITES.md for full details.
